evals.name: general-improvement
evals.prompt: Take a look at the codebase at /Users/ganga/Documents/personal_repos/flow-atelier and give me an idea to improve it. I want one meaningful direction plus a few small concrete things I could actually do.
evals.expected_output: One improvement theme grounded in specific files/code observed in flow-atelier, plus 2-4 concrete small wins each pointing at a real file. No generic advice; proposes only, does not edit code.

evals.name: focus-area-testing
evals.prompt: Look at /Users/ganga/Documents/personal_repos/flow-atelier and suggest where I could improve the test suite or developer experience. What's the low-hanging fruit?
evals.expected_output: A theme scoped to testing/DX, grounded in the actual tests/ dir and tooling, with 2-4 concrete small wins tied to real files.

evals.name: dedup-fresh-angle
evals.prompt: Here's a list of ideas I've already worked through: /Users/ganga/.claude/skills/idea-workspace/fixtures/prior-ideas.md . Give me a fresh idea to improve /Users/ganga/Documents/personal_repos/flow-atelier that isn't already on that list.
evals.expected_output: A theme that deliberately avoids everything in prior-ideas.md, grounded in real code, with concrete small wins. Demonstrates the freshness/rotation property.
